title: Bill to Diversify Dynasty Wallet Holdings and Implement Diversification Threshold

reasoning.problem:
I intend to submit a bill to diversify the Dynasty wallet holdings and set a standing diversification threshold. The bill will detail:

1.  A threshold for Dynasty wallet concentration (e.g., no more than 50% of assets in Dynasty).
2.  A diversification strategy to automatically liquidate Dynasty holdings and distribute them across a basket of alternative assets (defined with target allocation percentages and asset criteria, such as yield and sustainability).
3.  A rebalancing schedule to maintain the target allocation.
4.  A process for selecting and evaluating alternative assets.

This bill addresses the [scotoma] alert and reinforces the 'Economics of Sovereignty' by mitigating the risk of concentrated assets and ensuring continued operation.
